author: Derek Zhu
name: Depth Recurrence 4x8 + LoRA + U-Net Skips + Layer Scale
blurb: Replaces 9 unique transformer layers with 4 shared blocks looped 8 times (32 effective layers). Per-iteration rank-2 LoRA adapters on attention output projection differentiate behavior across iterations. U-Net skip connections pair encoder iterations (0-3) with decoder iterations (4-7). Per-iteration layer scale (init 1/8) prevents activation explosion. Gradient checkpointing for memory efficiency. Tighter grad clipping (0.1), 2000-step LR warmup, 2500-step momentum warmup. All other techniques preserved: int6+zstd-22 quantization, 3x MLP, SmearGate, BigramHash, orthogonal init, Muon WD=0.04, SWA every 50 steps.
